Client Satisfaction

Who We Are

A Legacy Built on Trust

Scott Jarrett & Stuart Lougher — operating as Team Exceed — are two of the Bay of Plenty's most respected real estate professionals. With a combined track record spanning successful sales across Whakatāne, Ōhope, Edgecumbe and beyond, they bring unparalleled local knowledge and zero financial risk before your property sells.

Scott is a born-and-raised Whakatāne local with deep community roots, having served 12 years as a district councillor. Together with Stuart, they operate under the Arizto platform — New Zealand's leading no-upfront-cost agency — serving clients across the Eastern Bay of Plenty with 5-star dedication.

No Sale, No Fee 7-Day Support Licensed REAA 2008 Digital Dashboard Drone Photography Bay of Plenty Specialists
Book a Free Appraisal

What We Offer

Everything Included

Every service below is included at no upfront cost. You only pay once your property successfully sells — the ultimate risk-free model for Bay of Plenty homeowners.

01
Dedicated Licensed Agents
Scott & Stuart are with you from listing to settlement. Open contract — no lock-ins, no pressure.
02
4K Drone Photography
DJI aerial footage, indoor & outdoor photography, HD video, and architectural floor plans — all included.
03
Maximum Market Exposure
Listed on Trade Me, realestate.co.nz, OneRoof, Hougarden, Homes.co.nz and Arizto simultaneously.
04
Live Seller Dashboard
Real-time tracking of enquiries, viewings, buyer feedback and offers — 24/7 from any device.
05
Legal Documentation
Contracts, Certificate of Title, rental appraisal, and solicitor liaison — all handled on your behalf.
06
7-Day NZ Support Team
A dedicated NZ-based support team available 7 days a week throughout your entire sale journey.

Free Property Appraisal

What Is Your Home Worth?

Find out what your property could sell for in today's market — completely free, with no obligation and no upfront cost. Scott and Stuart will provide an expert, honest assessment backed by deep local knowledge.

  • No upfront cost — ever
  • Honest, expert market valuation
  • Tailored marketing strategy included
  • Licensed professionals with local expertise
  • Response within 24 hours, 7 days a week
  • No obligation — just good advice
